policy.training_rule: Prefer generated task specs and permissively licensed snippets with provenance. Do not ingest restricted solicitation attachments, credentials, private notebooks, or account-only portal data.
policy.poly_encoding_goal: Represent each task as one contract across code lenses, binary/hex transport, CA operation hints, and GeoSeal tokenizer metadata.

sources.title: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities API
sources.license_or_terms: public government metadata; attachments may have separate restrictions
sources.allowed_use: Search software/coding opportunities and derive high-level task shapes from public descriptions.
sources.blocked_use: Do not train on private account data, controlled attachments, proprietary PWS/SOW text, or offeror submissions.

sources.title: DARPA AI Cyber Challenge public materials
sources.license_or_terms: public program/news materials; challenge project repos have their own licenses
sources.allowed_use: Generate vulnerability-finding and patching task templates based on public challenge structure.
sources.blocked_use: Do not copy exploit payloads or unsafe operational details into general SFT without a security gate.

sources.title: NASA Open Source Software Catalog
sources.allowed_use: Discover NASA software projects and derive mission/data-processing task specs from permissively licensed repositories.
sources.blocked_use: Do not assume all catalog entries share one license; verify per repository before snippet ingestion.

sources.title: Meta Kaggle Code
sources.license_or_terms: Apache-2.0 public notebook code dataset with sensitive-information caveat
sources.allowed_use: Extract notebook task patterns, data-cleaning idioms, and ML workflow skeletons after secret filtering.
sources.blocked_use: Do not ingest raw notebooks without secret scans, license metadata, and user-data filtering.

sources.title: The Stack
sources.license_or_terms: permissively licensed code subset with opt-out governance and per-file license metadata
sources.allowed_use: Use as a source of permissive coding patterns after language/license filtering and malware/secret filtering.
sources.blocked_use: Do not mix licenses blindly or ingest code without preserving license and repository provenance.

seed_tasks.instruction: Implement safe_divide(a, b) so division by zero returns None/null and normal division returns the quotient.
Implement parse_json_name(payload) so it returns the name field from a JSON object string, or None/null on invalid JSON or missing name.
Implement grid_neighbors(row, col, rows, cols) returning valid 4-neighbor grid coordinates inside bounds.
Patch read_at(buf, idx) so it returns None/null when idx is outside the buffer instead of reading out of bounds.
Implement normalize_scores(values) returning min-max normalized floats, or all zeros when the range is zero.
